column5:
Dedicated section for marketplace sellers using platforms such as Amazon, eBay, Etsy and TikTok Shop. Focus on helping sellers manage growing order volumes, meet customer delivery expectations and simplify shipping across multiple sales channels. 

Key Heading: Shipping built for enterprise scale. 

Subheading: From multi-site fulfilment to international delivery management, ITD Global helps enterprise businesses simplify shipping, improve delivery performance and maintain flexibility as operations grow. 

Key Points: Messaging should highlight access to competitive shipping rates across 85+ carriers, reliable tracked and next-day delivery options, easy returns management, local depot network across Manchester, Birmingham and London and international shipping support with automated customs documentation. 

Include integrations with major marketplaces and ecommerce platforms. 

CTA: Get Started.
column6:
Write from scratch. 
Focus on marketplace seller pain points including delivery speed, customer expectations, scaling orders and managing returns across channels. 
Avoid overly technical language. 
Confirm depot locations and international shipping country count before publishing. 
Design requirement: audience section layout tailored to marketplace sellers. 
Imagery should include online marketplace selling, parcels, warehouse packing or delivery visuals. 
Include internal links to /integrations and /solutions/international.
